name: admin
label: Administrator
description: Full system access including user, role, permission, and configuration management.

name: developer
label: Developer
description: Full access to configurations and testing features, no user management.

name: external
label: External
description: Restricted read-only access, typically used for external collaborators.

name: intern
label: Intern
description: Intern with limited analysis specific access

name: manager
label: Manager
description: Can manage samples and configs within assigned groups. Cannot modify app-level or user-wide settings.

name: tester
label: Tester
description: Can test full features except user, schema, or config-level access.

name: user
label: Standard User
description: Can view and interact with samples assigned to their group. No admin or config access.

name: viewer
label: Viewer
description: Read-only access to samples and reports.
